changes.result: CONFIRMED — SCRIPT EXISTS AND IS STRUCTURALLY SOUND
changes.finding: CONFIRMED. backend/scripts/validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py exists (514 lines, read in full). It is the P1-13 activation-readiness validator. It is report-only and does not mutate any files. Key structural findings: (1) uses hardcoded STAGED_BATCHES dict (lines 26-30) pointing to all 3 batch directories; (2) accepts --ssot, --psi-schema, --packages-root, --json, --fail-on-blocked args; (3) emits plain-text summary to stdout plus optional JSON via --json flag; (4) classify_item() priority logic at lines 147-170 handles multi-blocker priority correctly; (5) source_spec_id check at line 306 verifies each compile manifest has a source_spec_id. Script is ready for Phase 1 re-run.

changes.finding: The prompt Phase 1 specifies the validator command as: python backend/scripts/validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py --staged-root knowledge_bus/generated_pilot --batches p1_10_batch_a p1_11_batch_b p1_12_batch_c. The actual script (lines 456-485) has NO --staged-root or --batches arguments. The correct invocation is simply: python backend/scripts/validate_staged_psi_activation_readiness.py (batches are hardcoded at lines 26-30 and default to all 3 batches). The prompt contains its own fallback: 'If the script uses different arguments, inspect the script help and run the correct equivalent.' This self-corrects. However, Cursor must NOT attempt to add --staged-root/--batches args to the script. Run without those flags.

CONFIRMED. P1-13 manifest hypothetical_if_hash_integrity_resolved (lines 37-42) projects: ACTIVATION_READY: 22, BLOCKED_BIOMARKER_IDENTITY: 9, BLOCKED_DERIVED_MARKER_DEPENDENCY: 7, BLOCKED_MEDICAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED: 3. These sum to 41 — consistent with the total estate. The classify_item() priority logic in the validator (lines 147-170) confirms this projection is plausible: once hash blockers are removed, packages with only hash mismatch will become ACTIVATION_READY, while those with additional blockers will surface the next-priority blocker. Cursor must not force this result — verify from actual validator output. If the split differs, report and explain.
